---
title: "MN26 Pipeline"
subtitle: "The Essentials"
author: "Kidsights Data Platform"
date: today
format:
  revealjs:
    theme: simple
    slide-number: true
    incremental: false
    scrollable: true
    preview-links: auto
    transition: slide
    background-transition: fade
    code-fold: false
    code-line-numbers: false
    width: 1200
    height: 750
    margin: 0.08
    embed-resources: true
    fig-cap-location: bottom
execute:
  eval: false
  echo: true
---

## What is the MN26 Pipeline? {.smaller}

**ETL pipeline for the Minnesota 2026 Kidsights study**, a NORC-administered
REDCap survey measuring early childhood development in children ages 0–5.

::: {.columns}
::: {.column width="50%"}
### What it does

- Pulls raw data from 4 REDCap projects via API
- Pivots multi-child households (up to 2 children) to long format
- Recodes raw REDCap fields into ~600 analysis-ready variables
- Applies eligibility filter (consent + child age 0-5.99 yr)
- Scores Kidsights IRT (all eligible), CREDI (under 4 yr), GSED D-score, and HRTL (ages 3-5; Motor unmasked via NORC `_end` catch-up)
- Stores results in DuckDB
:::

::: {.column width="50%"}
### Production scale (latest run, 2026-04-27)

| Stage | Count |
|---|---:|
| Records extracted | 10,400 |
| Rows after pivot | 10,773 |
| Eligible | 1,296 |
| Kidsights scored | 1,158 |
| CREDI scored (<4 yr) | 411 |
| D-score scored | 1,161 |
| HRTL scored (3-5 yr) | 555 |
| Runtime (full) | 2.6 sec |

**Entry point:** `run_mn26_pipeline.R`
**Full guide:** `docs/mn26/pipeline_guide.qmd`
:::
:::

---

## Data Flow {.smaller}

::: {.r-stretch}
```{=html}
<svg viewBox="0 0 1100 600" xmlns="http://www.w3.org/2000/svg" style="width:100%;height:auto;max-height:560px" role="img">
  <defs>
    <marker id="slide-arrow" viewBox="0 0 10 10" refX="9" refY="5" markerWidth="6" markerHeight="6" orient="auto-start-reverse">
      <path d="M 0 0 L 10 5 L 0 10 z" fill="#475569"/>
    </marker>
    <style>
      .s-step   { rx: 8; ry: 8; stroke-width: 1.5; }
      .s-title  { font-size: 15px; font-weight: 600; fill: #0f172a; font-family: sans-serif; }
      .s-file   { font-size: 10px; font-family: Consolas, monospace; fill: #475569; }
      .s-count  { font-size: 13px; font-weight: 700; fill: #b91c1c; font-family: sans-serif; }
      .s-flow   { stroke: #475569; stroke-width: 2; fill: none; }
      .s-ext    { fill: #fff; stroke: #94a3b8; stroke-dasharray: 5 3; }
      .s-ext-t  { font-size: 13px; fill: #475569; font-style: italic; font-family: sans-serif; }
      .p-ext    { fill: #dbeafe; stroke: #2563eb; }
      .p-piv    { fill: #e0f2fe; stroke: #0284c7; }
      .p-tx     { fill: #dcfce7; stroke: #16a34a; }
      .p-el     { fill: #fef3c7; stroke: #d97706; }
      .p-sc     { fill: #fae8ff; stroke: #c026d3; }
      .p-st     { fill: #f1f5f9; stroke: #64748b; }
    </style>
  </defs>

  <!-- Source -->
  <rect x="380" y="10" width="340" height="40" class="s-ext"/>
  <text x="550" y="35" text-anchor="middle" class="s-ext-t">REDCap API — 4 NORC projects</text>

  <!-- Step 1 & 2: Extract -->
  <rect x="60" y="80" width="300" height="50" class="s-step p-ext"/>
  <text x="210" y="100" text-anchor="middle" class="s-title">1 · Load credentials</text>
  <text x="210" y="117" text-anchor="middle" class="s-file">R/extract/mn26.R</text>

  <rect x="740" y="80" width="300" height="50" class="s-step p-ext"/>
  <text x="890" y="100" text-anchor="middle" class="s-title">2 · Extract data + dictionary</text>
  <text x="890" y="117" text-anchor="middle" class="s-file">R/extract/mn26.R</text>

  <path d="M 720 50 L 890 80" class="s-flow" marker-end="url(#slide-arrow)"/>
  <path d="M 360 105 L 740 105" class="s-flow" marker-end="url(#slide-arrow)"/>

  <path d="M 890 130 L 890 165" class="s-flow" marker-end="url(#slide-arrow)"/>
  <text x="890" y="153" text-anchor="middle" class="s-count">10,400 rec</text>


  <!-- Step 3: Pivot -->
  <rect x="740" y="165" width="300" height="50" class="s-step p-piv"/>
  <text x="890" y="185" text-anchor="middle" class="s-title">3 · Wide-to-long pivot</text>
  <text x="890" y="202" text-anchor="middle" class="s-file">R/transform/mn26_pivot.R</text>

  <path d="M 890 215 L 890 250" class="s-flow" marker-end="url(#slide-arrow)"/>
  <text x="890" y="238" text-anchor="middle" class="s-count">10,773 rows</text>

  <!-- Step 5: Transform -->
  <rect x="740" y="250" width="300" height="50" class="s-step p-tx"/>
  <text x="890" y="270" text-anchor="middle" class="s-title">5 · recode_it() transforms</text>
  <text x="890" y="287" text-anchor="middle" class="s-file">R/transform/mn26_transforms.R</text>

  <path d="M 890 300 L 890 335" class="s-flow" marker-end="url(#slide-arrow)"/>

  <!-- Step 6-7: Eligibility -->
  <rect x="740" y="335" width="300" height="50" class="s-step p-el"/>
  <text x="890" y="355" text-anchor="middle" class="s-title">6–7 · Eligibility + inclusion</text>
  <text x="890" y="372" text-anchor="middle" class="s-file">R/harmonize/mn26_eligibility.R</text>

  <path d="M 890 385 L 890 420" class="s-flow" marker-end="url(#slide-arrow)"/>
  <text x="890" y="408" text-anchor="middle" class="s-count">1,296 eligible</text>

  <!-- Steps 8 / 8.5 / 8.6 / 8.7: Scoring (Kidsights + CREDI + GSED + HRTL) -->
  <rect x="740" y="420" width="300" height="50" class="s-step p-sc"/>
  <text x="890" y="440" text-anchor="middle" class="s-title">8 / 8.5 / 8.6 / 8.7 · Scoring</text>
  <text x="890" y="457" text-anchor="middle" class="s-file">Kidsights · CREDI · GSED · HRTL</text>

  <path d="M 890 470 L 890 505" class="s-flow" marker-end="url(#slide-arrow)"/>
  <text x="890" y="493" text-anchor="middle" class="s-count">1158 / 411 / 1161 / 555</text>

  <!-- Storage -->
  <rect x="740" y="505" width="300" height="50" class="s-step p-st"/>
  <text x="890" y="525" text-anchor="middle" class="s-title">4, 9, 10 · DuckDB storage</text>
  <text x="890" y="542" text-anchor="middle" class="s-file">pipelines/python/insert_raw_data.py</text>

  <!-- Database -->
  <path d="M 740 530 L 380 530" class="s-flow" marker-end="url(#slide-arrow)"/>
  <rect x="60" y="505" width="300" height="50" class="s-ext"/>
  <text x="210" y="530" text-anchor="middle" class="s-ext-t">DuckDB</text>
  <text x="210" y="547" text-anchor="middle" class="s-file">mn26_raw · mn26_transformed · mn26_*_scores · mn26_hrtl_*</text>

  <!-- Legend -->
  <g transform="translate(60, 580)">
    <rect x="0"   y="0" width="12" height="12" class="p-ext"/> <text x="18" y="10" font-size="11" fill="#334155">Extract</text>
    <rect x="80"  y="0" width="12" height="12" class="p-piv"/> <text x="98" y="10" font-size="11" fill="#334155">Pivot</text>
    <rect x="150" y="0" width="12" height="12" class="p-tx"/>  <text x="168" y="10" font-size="11" fill="#334155">Transform</text>
    <rect x="240" y="0" width="12" height="12" class="p-el"/>  <text x="258" y="10" font-size="11" fill="#334155">Eligibility</text>
    <rect x="330" y="0" width="12" height="12" class="p-sc"/>  <text x="348" y="10" font-size="11" fill="#334155">Scoring</text>
    <rect x="410" y="0" width="12" height="12" class="p-st"/>  <text x="428" y="10" font-size="11" fill="#334155">Storage</text>
  </g>
</svg>
```
:::

---

## How to Run It {.smaller}

::: {.columns}
::: {.column width="55%"}
### One-line invocation

```bash
"C:/Program Files/R/R-4.5.1/bin/Rscript.exe" \
  run_mn26_pipeline.R --skip-database
```

- `--skip-database` runs everything *except* DB insertion (recommended for first run)
- Drop the flag for full run with DuckDB storage
- Add `--credentials <path>` to override credentials CSV

### Prerequisites

- R 4.5.1 · CmdStan · KidsightsPublic package
- Credentials CSV at
  `C:/my_auths/kidsights_redcap_norc_MN_2026.csv`
  (columns: `project,pid,api_code`)
:::

::: {.column width="45%"}
### Expected output

```
MN26 Pipeline Complete
========================================
  Records extracted:   10400
  After pivot:         10773
    (10400 c1 + 373 c2)
  Eligible:             1296
  Meets inclusion:      1296
  Kidsights scored:     1158
  CREDI scored:          411
  GSED D-score scored:  1161
  HRTL scored:           555
  HRTL Motor coverage: 99.5% (scored)
  Total duration:    2.6 sec
========================================
```

### Interactive use

```{.r code-line-numbers="false"}
source("pipelines/orchestration/mn26_pipeline.R")
result <- run_mn26_pipeline(skip_database = TRUE)
head(result$data)     # transformed + scored
result$metrics        # timing & counts
```
:::
:::

---

## Variable Recoding (Key Derived Variables) {.smaller}

| Derived var | Source REDCap | Transform location | NE25 → MN26 change |
|---|---|---|---|
| `sex`, `female` | `cqr009` | `recode__()` L460–487 | Same coding (1=F, 0=M) |
| `race`, `hisp`, `raceG` | `cqr010b___100..105` + `cqr011` | `recode__()` L333–410 | **Structural**: 15→6 categories |
| `a1_race`, `a1_hisp`, `a1_raceG` | `sq002b___100..105` + `sq003` | Same branch | **Structural**: 15→6 categories |
| `years_old`, `months_old`, `days_old` | `age_in_days_n` | `recode__()` L489–508 | **Renamed** from `age_in_days` |
| `female_a1` | `mn2` | `recode__()` L411–458 | **Renamed** from `cqr002`, added non-binary=97 |
| `educ_a1`, `educ4_*`, `educ6_*` | `cqr004` + `nschj017` | `recode__()` L555–700 | Same coding (0–8) |
| `income`, `inc99`, `fpl`, `fplcat` | `cqr006`, `consent_date_n`, `fqlive1_*` | `recode__()` L510–553 | **Recoded**: slider $500K → $250K+ |
| `eligible`, `meets_inclusion` | `eq001`, `age_in_days_n` | `check_mn26_eligibility()` | NORC pre-screened |

- **Dispatcher:** `recode_it(data, dict, what = "all")` in `R/transform/mn26_transforms.R`
- **Spot-check pattern:** `table(result$data$cqr009, result$data$female, useNA="always")` — diagonal should be clean
- **Full reference:** `docs/mn26/pipeline_guide.qmd` § Variable Recoding Reference

---

## Eligibility: NORC Pre-Screening Model {.smaller}

::: {.columns}
::: {.column width="50%"}
### Key design decision

NORC screens participants **before** routing to REDCap for:

- Caregiver age ≥ 19
- Primary caregiver status
- Minnesota residence

Only approved participants ever see the REDCap survey.

**Consequence:** the legacy NE25 fields (`eq002`, `eq003`, `mn_eqstate`)
are **absent** from production data exports — those columns
don't exist in the real data.

:::

::: {.column width="50%"}
### Adaptive criteria

**Always required** (pipeline errors if missing):

| Criterion | Field |
|---|---|
| Informed consent | `eq001 == 1` |
| Child age 0–5.99 | `age_in_days_n < 2191` |

**Applied only if columns exist** (skipped in production):

- Parent age ≥ 19 · `eq003`
- Primary caregiver · `eq002`
- Minnesota residence · `mn_eqstate`

Verbose output shows exactly which criteria were applied vs. skipped:

```
Total children:         10773
Consent (eq001):         1411 [required]
Child age (<6yr):        1296 [required]
Parent age (eq003):      column absent [NORC pre-screened, skipped]
Primary CG (eq002):      column absent [NORC pre-screened, skipped]
MN residence:            column absent [NORC pre-screened, skipped]
```
:::
:::

**Bottom line:** eligible = passed consent AND valid child age. Scored records (Step 8) are the further subset with ≥ 5 non-missing item responses.
